query_title: Pokémon the Movie: Kyurem vs. the Sword of Justice

recommendations.title: Pokémon the Movie: Mewtwo Strikes Back - Evolution
recommendations.overview: After accepting an invitation from a mysterious trainer, Ash, Misty and Brock meet Mewtwo, an artificially created Pokémon who wants to do battle.

recommendations.title: Pokémon: The First Movie
recommendations.overview: Determined to prove its superiority, a bio-engineered Pokémon called Mewtwo lures Ash, Pikachu and others into a Pokemon match like none before.

recommendations.title: Pokémon: Destiny Deoxys
recommendations.overview: Deoxys, a Pokémon from outer space, terrorizes the high-tech city Ash Ketchum and his friends are visiting.

recommendations.title: Pokémon the Movie 2000
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Animation, Science Fiction, Family
recommendations.overview: When Lawrence III's scheme to capture the Legendary Pokémon Lugia upsets the balance of nature, it is up to Ash Ketchum and his friends to save the world.

recommendations.title: Pokémon Ranger and the Temple of the Sea
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: On their way through the Battle Frontier, Ash and friends meet up with a Pokémon Ranger who's mission is to deliever the egg of Manaphy to a temple on the ocean's floor. However, a greedy pirate wants the power of Manaphy to himself.

recommendations.title: Pokémon: Giratina and the Sky Warrior
recommendations.overview: When Giratina is discovered to be able to create parallel dimensions, it's up to Ash and his friends to stop a mysterious stranger from using its powers for evil.

recommendations.title: Pokémon the Movie: I Choose You!
recommendations.overview: Ash Ketchum wakes up late one morning after having broken his alarm clock in his sleep. He eventually makes it to Professor Oak's lab, but is told that the three starter List of Pokémon (Bulbasaur, Squirtle, and Charmander) have already been taken by

recommendations.title: Pokémon Heroes
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Action, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Ash, Pikachu and the gang try and stop a pair of thieves hiding out in the canals and alleyways of Altomare, the age-old water capital. Joining the adventure are two new legendary Pokémon, a pair of siblings named Latias and Latios, who serve as peac

recommendations.title: Pokémon the Movie: Hoopa and the Clash of Ages
recommendations.overview: Ash, Pikachu, and their friends come to a desert city by the sea. Here they meet the Mythical Pokémon Hoopa, which has the ability to summon things—including people and Pokémon—through its magic rings. After a scary incident, they learn of a story ab

recommendations.title: Pokémon: Arceus and the Jewel of Life
recommendations.overview: When the creator of the world, Arceus, comes to pass judgement on humanity for the theft of the legendary Jewel of Life, Ash and his friends are sent back in time to possibly reverse the events that led to Arceus' vendetta.
